option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Badge --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/chip_background_neutral" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="Fast delivery" android:textColor="#475569" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="normal" />
<Space android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<!-- Favorite Icon --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivHeart" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_heart_outline" android:contentDescription="Add to favourites" app:tint="#64748B" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Content: Image + Info --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp">
<!-- Restaurant Image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivRestaurantIcon" android:layout_width="70dp" android:layout_height="70dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_restaurant" android:background="@drawable/restaurant_card_header_background" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:padding="18dp" android:contentDescription="Restaurant icon" app:tint="@color/white" />
<!-- Info: Name, Category, Meta --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical">
<!-- Restaurant Name --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvRestaurantName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="BBQ Nation" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#0F172A" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" />
<!-- Category --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvFoodCategory" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="BBQ" android:textColor="#64748B" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" />
<!-- Meta: Rating + Time --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvRating" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="⭐ 4.0 • 20-30 min" android:textColor="#64748B" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Actions Row: Secondary + Primary Buttons --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- View Menu Button (Secondary) --> <com.example.restaurantapp.ui.components.SecondaryButton android:id="@+id/btnOpen" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="5dp" />
<!-- Order Now Button (Primary) --> <com.example.restaurantapp.ui.components.PrimaryButton android:id="@+id/btnOrder" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="5dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Hidden elements for backward compatibility --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvPriceCategory" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStars" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Badge --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/chip_background_neutral" android:paddingHorizontal="10dp" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="Fast delivery" android:textColor="#475569" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="normal" />
<Space android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<!-- Favorite Icon --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivHeart" android:layout_width="32dp" android:layout_height="32dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:padding="6dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_heart_outline" android:contentDescription="Add to favourites" app:tint="#64748B" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Content: Image + Info --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="14dp">
<!-- Restaurant Image (food photo from spritesheet) --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivRestaurantIcon" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_restaurant" android:background="@drawable/restaurant_card_header_background" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:clipToOutline="true" android:contentDescription="Restaurant photo" />
<!-- Info: Name, Category, Meta --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical">
<!-- Restaurant Name --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvRestaurantName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="BBQ Nation" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="#0F172A" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" />
<!-- Category --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvFoodCategory" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="BBQ" android:textColor="#64748B" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" />
<!-- Meta: Rating + Time --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvRating" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="⭐ 4.0 • 20-30 min" android:textColor="#64748B" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Actions Row: Secondary + Primary Buttons --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<!-- View Menu Button (Secondary) --> <com.example.restaurantapp.ui.components.SecondaryButton android:id="@+id/btnOpen" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="5dp" />
<!-- Order Now Button (Primary) --> <com.example.restaurantapp.ui.components.PrimaryButton android:id="@+id/btnOrder" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="5dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Hidden elements for backward compatibility --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvPriceCategory" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStars" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:visibility="gone" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
